content: agent2: implementing process_priority param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will touch these two files.

agent2: done. Added process_priority param to Editor.__init__ (stored as self.process_priority) and a new Editor._popen_priority_kwargs() helper used inside edit_file()'s subprocess.Popen call (adds creationflags on Windows / preexec_fn os.nice on Unix). Also added process_priority kwarg to termui.edit(), passed through to Editor(...). Didn't touch edit_file's signature/name or the filename param handling, so should merge cleanly with your edit_file->edit_files rename as long as you keep passing process_priority through to Editor(...) and preserve the Popen kwargs in whatever edit_files() does per-file.
